title: More Generic Tags
description: Adds runtime-generated tags for tech-mod-esque items
body:
Have you tried a tech mod that adds plates but doesn't add a single tag for all the plates, then you tried to automate any kind of plate production through [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) and its attribute filter? Well, this is the mod for you!

More Generic Tags (`gentag`) is a small mod that searches for anything that looks like plates, ingots, nuggets, dusts, and rods, and it appends an appropriate tag to each to provide some general matching tags.

It also supports a small config to add other suffixes to check
